name: restaurant operations managers overseeing 5-15 locations tool
description: For restaurant operations managers overseeing 5-15 locations, manual tracking of food safety compliance causes missed inspections. We automate daily compliance checklists instead of paper checklists and manual audits.
problem_solved: manual tracking of food safety compliance
